name: Lettuce & Fruit Salad with Poppy Seed Dressin
recipeIngredient: Mandarin oranges, drained (3 cans at 11 oz each)
Grapefruit, pink, peeled, seeded, and sectioned (6 cups)
Bibb lettuce heads, torn into bite-size pieces (6 heads)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mandarin oranges, grapefruit sections, and lettuce in a large salad bowl.
2. Toss lightly until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Serve with Poppy Seed Dressing.
Poppy Seed Dressing:
1. In a container of electric blender, combine chopped onion (up to 1/2 cup), vinegar, tarragon, vegetable oil, poppy seeds (2 1/2 tbsp), sugar (1 tbsp), salt (1 tsp), and dry mustard (1 tsp).
2. Blend well until smooth.
3. Slowly add the additional 3/4 cup of vegetable oil while continuing to blend.
4. Pour the dressing into a jar with a tight-fitting lid and chill.
5. Shake well before serving.
Yield: 2 cups
Food Exchange per Serving: 1 FRUIT EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
Note: The original recipe is from Southern Living Magazine, July 1980, and was typed for you by Nancy Coleman.
